description_long: This is a tall, pentagonal cabinet with a modern design, featuring a combination of light wood grain and smooth white panels. The front face has three rectangular black panels, likely glass or opaque inserts, set vertically in the center of the wood grain door. The sides alternate between white and wood grain finishes, giving it a contemporary, contrasting appearance. The cabinet appears to be freestanding and is likely used for storage, possibly in a corner due to its angled back. The surface is flat and hard, suitable for supporting small objects on top. No visible handles are present, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or concealed grip.
description: A tall, pentagonal cabinet with wood grain and white panels, featuring three black rectangular inserts on the front. Modern, freestanding, and likely used for storage.
description_view_0: Shows the wood grain side and a white panel, highlighting the cabinet's angular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Displays two white panels and the wood grain top, emphasizing the contrast between materials.
description_view_2: Front view with three black rectangular inserts set vertically in the wood grain door, indicating the main access point.
description_view_3: Reveals the full wood grain side and the angled top, with no visible openings or handles.
